CVE-2023-28144.title: KDAB Hotspot 1.3.x and 1.4.x through 1.4.1, in a non-default conf ...
CVE-2023-28144.description: KDAB Hotspot 1.3.x and 1.4.x through 1.4.1, in a non-default configuration, allows privilege escalation because of race conditions involving symlinks and elevate_perf_privileges.sh chown calls.
